title: AI chip startup Etched defies skeptics, hits $10.3B valuation from big-name investors | TechCrunch
summary: Etched, the AI chip startup founded by three Harvard dropouts in 2022, has closed a $300 million Series C funding round at a $10.3 billion valuation, co-founder and COO Robert Wachen tells TechCrunch.
